title: Error
subtitle: Error-handling helpers for returning error values from methods instead of raising exceptions.

members.name: ifError
members.description:
Evaluates code in the context of sender. Returns self.
Another form is Error ifError(error, code). Note: error slot is set in the context of sender, Locals object is not created!

members.name: returnIfError
members.description: Returns self from the context of sender.

members.name: with
members.description: Returns new error with message slot set.
